options.name: -cell
options.description: Cell Name for which equivalent cells need to be fetched

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: to fetch equivalent cells from libraries of a specific delay corner only

options.name: -early_only
options.description: to fetch cells only from early libraries of the specified delay corner

options.name: -late_only
options.description: to fetch cells only from late libraries of the specified delay corner

options.name: -library
options.description: to fetch cells only for the given library

options.name: -max
options.description: to fetch equivalent cells from max libraries only

options.name: -min
options.description: to fetch equivalent cells from min libraries only

options.name: -power_domain
options.description: to fetch cells only for the libraries of a specific power domain
